audit_config.project_root: D:\Work Space\他山之石\情绪门控
audit_config.cache_root: D:\Work Space\他山之石\情绪门控\project_cache\features

board_snapshot.runtime_block: Date-based empty return only for configured window

auction_yiqian_prepare.runtime_block: No direct runtime block; cache emptiness suppresses module execution

first_seal_time.mode: same_day identity filter + same_day minute scan
first_seal_time.runtime_block: Configured-window rows excluded from project seal cache only

board_snapshot.notes: Disk cache contains contaminated rows from 2026-05-25 onward and runtime only blocks reads inside the configured window.

first_seal_time.notes: Cache rows stop after 2026-05-25; runtime falls back to high_limit + minute data outside the project cache.

master_prepare_index.notes: Same-day aggregate of contaminated board_snapshot; no runtime quarantine is applied.

auction_yiqian_prepare.notes: Rolling dependencies mean the feature would become unsafe from 2026-05-26 onward even though the current disk cache does not continue past 2026-05-25.

call_auction_by_date.notes: Separate source path; no proof yet that its upstream source is isolated from the daily-limit pollution issue.

runtime_artifacts.notes: Checkpoint stores g_data and positions, not cache blobs; state can still reflect contaminated reads.

answers.q2_board_snapshot_affects_post_window_bo: Yes. Board_count collapses into 5517 contaminated rows/day from 2026-05-25 and stays pinned at board_count=3 through at least 2026-12-31.
answers.q3_first_seal_contains_contaminated_firs: Yes on 2026-05-25 (5047 rows). After that the cache stops emitting rows, so later dates are not proven safe.
answers.q4_master_prepare_runtime_direct_polluti: Yes. Loader returns cached master_prepare_index rows directly with no configured-window or post-window quarantine.
answers.q5_auction_yiqian_impact_beyond_2026_06_: Yes. The feature uses t-1/t-4 plus a 101-day high/volume window, so once 2026-05-25 enters the source window, later feature dates remain unsafe. The current disk cache hides this by stopping after 2026-05-25.
answers.q6_call_auction_independence: Not proven. It reads a different source tree, but this audit cannot certify that upstream source as isolated from the pollution problem.
answers.q7_fastpath_bypass_field_match: No. The configured bypass covers pre_close/high_limit/low_limit/money/volume, while observed raw corruption also affects open/close/high/low.
answers.q8_high_only_fastpath_gap: Yes. A request for high only can bypass the current guard even though observed raw corruption and point overrides show high is affected.
answers.q9_dirty_cache_hidden_by_empty_loader: Yes. auction_yiqian_prepare and first_seal_time both rely on missing/empty cache paths or guarded misses that do not prove cache safety.
answers.q10_checkpoint_and_alignment_carry_risk: Yes. 2026 checkpoints, local_state outputs, and 2026 alignment compare files exist for dates inside the audit window and should be treated as downstream products, not clean references.
